get.summary: Reads the pricing procedure item for a specific subtotal line description.
get.description: Reads data of the pricing procedure item in Sales for a specific subtotal line description. Consumers must pass "A" as condition usage, "V" as condition application, language, pricing procedure, pricing procedure step, and pricing procedure counter. A pricing procedure item can be a line for a condition type or a subtotal according to a combination of step and counter numbers.

get.summary: Reads the pricing procedure item of a specific pricing procedure.
get.description: Reads pricing procedure item data from a specific pricing procedure in Sales, which the consumer specifies by passing "A" as condition usage, "V" as condition application, and a pricing procedure. Pricing procedure item data contains a list of condition types and subtotal lines ordered by a combination of step and counter numbers.

post.description:
Group multiple requests into a single request payload, see [Batch Processing (OData Version 2.0)](https://www.odata.org/documentation/odata-version-2-0/batch-processing/).

*Please note that "Try it out" is not supported for this request.*

multipart/mixed;boundary=request-separat.example:
--request-separator
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary

GET A_SlsPrcgCndnTypeText HTTP/1.1
Accept: application/json


--request-separator--

multipart/mixed.example:
--response-separator
Content-Type: application/http

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Type: application/json

{...}
--response-separator--

PricingProcedure.title: Procedure (Pricing, Output Control, Acct. Det., Costing,...)

ConditionCategory.title: Condition Category (Examples: Tax, Freight, Price, Cost)

PrcgConditionAmountSign.title: Plus/Minus Sign of the condition Amount

PrcgGroupConditionRoutine.title: Routine Number for Creating Group Key

PrcgCndnTypeDeletionIsAllowed.title: Delete the Scope for Changing Amount/Percentage

PrcgCndnPrpsdValidFromDateCode.title: Proposed Start Date for the Validity Period

PrcgCndnPrpsdValidToDateCode.title: Proposed End Date for the Validity Period

PrcgConditionDeletionMethod.title: Condition records should be deleted from the database

PricingScaleRoutine.title: Routine for Alternative Calculation of Scale Base Value

IsRelevantForAccrual.title: Condition is Relevant for Accrual  (e.g. Freight)

CndnValueZeroProcgCode.title: Process Conditions with Value Equal to Zero

PricingProcedure.title: Procedure (Pricing, Output Control, Acct. Det., Costing,...)

CndnIsAcctDetnRelevant.title: Statistical and Relevant for Account Determination

PricingProcedure.title: Procedure (Pricing, Output Control, Acct. Det., Costing,...)
Procedure (Pricing, Output Control, Acct. Det., Costing,...)
